name: mitchellmooregolf
about: The Mitchell Moore Golf Academy is a professional golf instruction facility located at Hopkinsville Golf and Country Club in Hopkinsville, Kentucky. Founded by Mitchell Moore, a recognized Golf Digest Best Young Teacher and KPGA Teacher of the Year, the academy focuses on player development through technical instruction, fitness, and course management. The indoor training center features a Foresight launch monitor and simulator setup with a large projection screen. The facility operates as a teaching studio rather than a retail simulator bay rental venue, with access available through lesson bookings and scheduled programs. The academy offers winter training programs, junior development classes, and individual coaching packages. Online lessons are also available for remote instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple award-winning instructor with Golf Digest and KPGA recognition
Foresight launch monitor technology for accurate ball flight data
Large 9'x16' simulation screen for immersive practice
Comprehensive training including fitness, mental game, and course management
Junior development programs with Operation 36 curriculum

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; located at country club which may have separate dining
No alcohol service mentioned at the academy

simulator_hardware.notes: Part of indoor training facility setup

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The academy has training aids and equipment available. Contact Mitchell Moore Golf directly to confirm if clubs are provided for lessons or if you should bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: The academy does not appear to have food or beverage service. As it is located at Hopkinsville Golf and Country Club, check with the facility regarding outside food policy or club dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This is a training studio focused on instruction rather than recreational simulator play. Lesson durations vary by package - contact the academy for specific timing.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers junior programs including Operation 36 winter programs, fundamentals classes, and middle/high school training programs specifically designed for youth golfers.
